name: FETAL TUMOR
chapter: DIFFERENTIAL DIAGNOSIS OF OBSTETRIC AND GYNECOLOGIC
definition: CONGENITAL TUMOR mass in fetus + newborn manifesting in first 3 months of life

demographics.Associated with: congenital leukemia of Down syndrome (15-fold increase of leukemia)

discriminating_features: hydrops ← fetal anemia / leukemic infiltrate of myocardium / visceral fibrosis with ↑

general: hydrops ← fetal anemia / leukemic infiltrate of myocardium / visceral fibrosis with ↑
